description: Build a cohesive support engineering ladder: entry support engineers and escalation engineers as one family. Counter stigma, give customers a credible next level, and teach when they want the wrong thing.

examples.context: Top support needed a real next title. Customers wanted next level. Stigma on support.
examples.resolution: Support engineer into escalation engineer track. Same family. Pride and clarity up.

examples.context: Customer demanded wrong escalated path. Raw no would enrage.
examples.resolution: Engineer taught correct path. Customer felt handled; issue resolved without politics.

examples.context: Same class always hit escalation eng.
examples.resolution: KB to line. Escalation volume on that theme dropped.
